title: coreopsis leucorrhiza
intro: Coreopsis leucorrhiza, also known as the tickseed, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the sunflower family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Coreopsis leucorrhiza include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
